# {{ .Heading }}

Welcome to **{{ .Title }}**, a hex-rendered Markdown page.

## Features

- Full GFM support
- Auto heading IDs (h2/h3 anchors work)
- Syntax highlighting via chroma

```go
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
    fmt.Println("hex + markdown = ok")
}
```

> Quote blocks flow through unchanged.
